summary: Backend API testing completed for Vivo BI Dashboard. All 15 endpoints tested and passing. API correctly proxies external Vivo BI API and provides analytics aggregations.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper async HTTP client management
Good error handling for upstream API failures (502 for connection errors, pass-through for HTTP errors)
Consider adding caching for frequently accessed endpoints like /locations to reduce upstream calls
seed_data_creation: None - uses external Vivo BI API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints working. External API has data for date range 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-17. Verified: 3 countries (Uganda, Kenya, Rwanda), 29 locations. Frontend testing was skipped per request.
